verdict: HELD-OUT-DOMAIN agreement: train-math->test-physics 0.488, train-physics->test-math 0.495 (both ~chance 0.50). The accepted/rejected direction is DOMAIN-SPECIFIC; cross-domain transfer fails. Mixed-domain training reaches 0.792 on held-out INSTANCES (within trained domains), but that is NOT a held-out DOMAIN. With only 2 verifier domains (math-sympy, physics-units) there is no true 3rd held-out domain, and the PRM-as-dense-RLVR-reward half needs a GPU RL stack. => W1's >=0.80 held-out-DOMAIN gate CANNOT be closed locally; needs a 3rd verifier domain or GPU RLVR.
